title: Last Chance to Claim Your Unswapped PART

tags.description: The latest buzz from Particl. Tomorrow's blockchain e-commerce privacy solution for the better of all.

plaintext:
We would like to announce that the Particl Portal
[https://portal.particl.io/login] will be closing down at the end of May. After
supporting it for two years, we will be willing to manually support the
unclaimed PART that are still left unclaimed for another 3 months, after which
the funds will not be able to be claimed anymore.

> Note: Particl Portal is the platform that has been used since 2017 to claim
swapped PART coins.
What you Need to Know
 * This only concerns people that have swapped their SDC for PART in 2017. If
   you have acquired PART at any time after the SDC:PART swap, then you can
   simply ignore this announcement.
 * To claim your PART coins, send an email to nick@particl.io
   [http://nick@particl.io] with your PART address as the message’s body. You
   must use the same email you’ve registered to the Particl Portal with.
 * PART coins will be sent on the 1st day of each month. The last day of payouts
   will be the 1st of October 2019.
 * Any remaining funds will be owned by the community. The Particl community
   will be able to decide on what to do with these funds by using Particl
   Desktop’s proposal system.


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Thanks

The Particl Team
html:
We would like to announce that the Particl Portal will be closing down at the end of May. After supporting it for two years, we will be willing to manually support the unclaimed PART that are still left unclaimed for another 3 months, after which the funds will not be able to be claimed anymore.

Note: Particl Portal is the platform that has been used since 2017 to claim swapped PART coins.

What you Need to Know

  • This only concerns people that have swapped their SDC for PART in 2017. If you have acquired PART at any time after the SDC:PART swap, then you can simply ignore this announcement.
  • To claim your PART coins, send an email to nick@particl.io with your PART address as the message’s body. You must use the same email you’ve registered to the Particl Portal with.
  • PART coins will be sent on the 1st day of each month. The last day of payouts will be the 1st of October 2019.
  • Any remaining funds will be owned by the community. The Particl community will be able to decide on what to do with these funds by using Particl Desktop’s proposal system.

Thanks

The Particl Team
